info: User ID of the person who has made an assertion about this record
name: assertionUserId

info: A list of all assertions (user and system supplied) for a record resulting from data quality tests
name: assertions

info: What this is a record of e.g. specimen, human observation, fossil http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/basisOfRecord
name: basisOfRecord

info: A field indicating if the record has been located in Terrestrial, Marine or Freshwater environment
name: biome

info: The class the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/class
name: class

info: The GUID for the taxonomic Class associated with this record
name: classID

info: The collection code for this record. This will be populated if the data has come from a museum or herbaria http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionCode
name: collectionCode

info: The name of the collection for this record e.g. Entomology Collection
name: collectionName

info: Concatenation of common name and LSID, useful for species breakdowns and sorting by common name
name: common_name_and_lsid

info: A radius in metres defining the smallest circle the location could occur within http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateUncertaintyInMeters
name: coordinateUncertaintyInMeters

info: The country where the specimen was collected or observation was made http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country
name: country

info: The country conservation status for the taxon associated with this record
name: countryConservation

info: The Atlas thematic groups for this record.
name: dataHubUid

info: The data provider for this record
name: dataProviderName

info: The Atlas ID for the data resource
name: dataProviderUid

info: The data resource that supplies the record. This is typically a CSV or DwCA file, or a webservice.
name: dataResourceName

info: A list (concatenated and separated) of preparations and preservation methods for a specimen.
name: dataResourceUid

info: The name of the dataset for this record. Typically used to share the name of the survey when data has been supplied with multiple surveys in a single data resource. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetName
name: datasetName

info: The precision of the date information for the record. Values include Day, Month, Year, Year range, Month range
name: datePrecision

info: The decade for this record e.g. 1910
name: decade

info: The decimal latitude associated with this record. If the original latitude was supplied in degrees, minutes, seconds, this value represents the converted value. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLatitude
name: decimalLatitude

info: The decimal longitude associated with this record. If the original longitude was supplied in degrees, minutes, seconds, this value represents the converted value. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLongitude
name: decimalLongitude

info: Identifies suspected duplicates (D), and what appears to be the best representation of suspected duplicate records (R)
name: duplicateStatus

info: The ISO formatted date of observation, specimen collection date. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventDate
name: eventDate

info: The family the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/family
name: family

info: The genus the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genus
name: genus

info: Atlas unique ID for this record http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordID
name: id

info: Single image URL for this record.
name: imageID

info: Image URLs for this record http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/images
name: imageIDs

info: The institution code for this record. This will be populated if the data has come from a museum or herbaria http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institutionCode
name: institutionCode

info: The name in use by the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.
name: institutionName

info: This field is used to identify possible duplicate records associated with this record. The ALA attempts to find the most complete record in a set of duplicates and identifies it as the principal occurrence or representative record.
name: isDuplicateOf

info: The kingdom the Atlas has matched this record to in the system classification http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/kingdom
name: kingdom

info: The kingdom ID for this record
name: kingdomID

info: Decimal coordinates as single comma separated string value e.g. -35.3,149.1
name: lat_long

info: The left value in the nested set for this record. Used for retrieving records within taxonomic groups.
name: lft

info: The license applying to a record.
name: license

info: Loan destination for this record (specimen). In use by Herbaria
name: loanDestination

info: Loan identifier for this record (specimen). In use by Herbaria
name: loanIdentifier

info: The locaility information that was supplied with the raw record. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality
name: locality

info: An indication of how a match to a concept was achieved. e.g. fuzzyMatch, exactMatch
name: matchType

info: Maximum depth in metres for this occurrence as supplied by the data publisher http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDepthInMeters
name: maximumDepthInMeters

description: Maximum Distance Above Surface In Meters
name: maximumDistanceAboveSurfaceInMeters

info: Minimum depth in metres for this occurrence. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDepthInMeters
name: minimumDepthInMeters

description: Minimum Distance Above Surface In Meters
name: minimumDistanceAboveSurfaceInMeters

info: Month of observation, specimen collection date. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/month
name: month

info: The scientific name parse type used when matching this record to a taxonomic concept.
name: nameType

info: Concatenation of common name and LSID, useful for species breakdowns and sorting by taxon name
name: names_and_lsid

info: A statement about the presence or absence of a taxon at a Location http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceStatus
name: occurrenceStatus

info: Year ranges for a search. Calculated based on the unique values for a query.
name: occurrenceYear

info: The order the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/order
name: order

info: The number of environmental spatial layers for which this record has been identified as an outlier by the Reverse Jackknife method
name: outlierLayerCount

info: The phylum the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/phylum
name: phylum

info: The phylum ID for this record
name: phylumID

info: Decimal coordinates at 0.1 degree resolution e.g. -35.3,149.1
name: point-0.1

info: Decimal coordinates at 1 degree resolution e.g -35,149
name: point-1

info: Provenance of this dataset. e.g. Published dataset, Draft, Individual sightings
name: provenance

info: The basis of record as supplied by the data publisher
name: raw_basisOfRecord

info: The original day value supplied by the data provider
name: raw_day

info: The decimal latitude as supplied by the data publisher
name: raw_decimalLatitude

info: The decimal longitude as supplied by the data publisher
name: raw_decimalLongitude

info: Maximum depth in metres for this occurrence as supplied by the data publisher
name: raw_maximumDepthInMeters

info: Max altitude/elevation for this occurrence as supplied by the data publisher
name: raw_maximumElevationInMeters

info: Minimum depth in metres for this occurrence as supplied by the data publisher
name: raw_minimumDepthInMeters

info: Min altitude/elevation for this occurrence as supplied by the data publisher
name: raw_minimumElevationInMeters

info: The original occurrence status value supplied by the data provider
name: raw_occurrenceStatus

info: Original scientific name supplied with the record http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificName
name: raw_scientificName

info: The original type status value supplied by the data provider
name: raw_typeStatus

info: The original common name value supplied by the data provider
name: raw_vernacularName

info: The collector for the occurrence. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedBy
name: recordedBy

info: The right value in the nested set for this record. Used for retrieving records within taxonomic groups.
name: rgt

info: The name the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificName
name: scientificName

info: This fields is populated if the record is sensitive. Values include generalised, alreadyGeneralised.
name: sensitive

info: The sex of the biological individual(s) represented in the Occurrence http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sex
name: sex

info: Whether this record is suitable for use in species distribution modelling.
name: spatiallyValid

info: The species the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/species
name: species

info: Higher level group for this record e.g. Birds
name: speciesGroup

info: The species ID for this record
name: speciesID

info: Used to search for the records of taxon on a specific list.
name: speciesListUid

info: Higher level subgroup for this record e.g. Parrots
name: speciesSubgroup

info: The state conservation status for the taxon.
name: stateConservation

info: The state or territory matching the supplied coordinates http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvince
name: stateProvince

info: The subfamily for this record. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subfamily
name: subfamily

info: The subspecies the Atlas has matched this record to in the NSL
name: subspecies

info: The subspecies ID for this record
name: subspeciesID

info: The super family for this record http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/superfamily
name: superfamily

info: The GUID for the concept in the National Species List (NSL) http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonConceptID
name: taxonConceptID

info: Numeric rank ID value. E.g. 7000 = species, 6000 = genus
name: taxonRankID

info: Lists any taxonomic data quality issues detected
name: taxonomicIssues

info: General purpose free text search field
name: text

info: Atomised botanical name for the nomenclatural type designation for the specimen, with elements according to the International Code of Botanical Nomenclature.
name: typifiedName

info: Lists the current state of any user assertions raised by ALA end users or data providers about an occurrence record.
name: userAssertions

info: The common name the ALA has matched this record to in the NSL http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/vernacularName
name: vernacularName

info: The year in which an occurrence was observed. http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/year
name: year

info: Zone ID. Generally a set of values specific to the dataset
name: zone
